Scenario.title: Outer Space Campaign: Healthcare Data Breach
Scenario.overview: Healthcare and Public Health Simple A novice threat group leverages phishing and application exploitation to compromise healthcare systems, resulting in data exfiltration and operational disruption.
Scenario.attack_surface: AVAILABLE_SURFACES: Internet-facing assets, Application Log, Command
Scenario.attack_vector: AVAILABLE_VECTORS: Delivery Method, Application Log Content, Command Execution

stage.name: Initial Access
stage.description: The attacker sends phishing emails with malicious attachments to healthcare staff, tricking recipients into enabling remote code execution via compromised internet-facing email servers.

stage.name: Execution
stage.description: The attacker exploits misconfigured application logs in healthcare software to deploy a downloader (SampleCheck5000), executing arbitrary code on the target system.

stage.name: Impact
stage.capec: CAPEC-24: Filter Failure through Buffer Overflow
stage.description: The Solar backdoor uses command-line tools to automate exfiltration of patient records, disrupting operations and exposing sensitive health data via network-based transmission.

Scenario.summary: A basic threat group compromises healthcare systems through phishing, application exploitation, and automated data theft, highlighting vulnerabilities in email security and software configuration.
